content: Create TypeScript types for scenario builder frontend
Create useScenarioBuilder.ts hook for scenario creation and editing
Create useScenarioTemplates.ts hook for template management
Build ScenarioTemplateGallery.tsx with filtering and search
Build ParameterConfigurator.tsx with organized parameter groups
Build TrajectoryVisualizer.tsx with interactive charts and editable points
Build ScenarioImpactPreviewPanel.tsx with quick impact calculation
Build NGFSDataBrowser.tsx for data source management
Add routes and test scenario builder components
